apps.name: LevelUp
apps.tagline: Level up your life across nine categories
apps.description: A gamified personal-development tracker. Earn XP and level up across nine life categories, log activities and daily habits, schedule events, and track vices with streaks. Works fully offline.

apps.name: Calorie Counter
apps.tagline: Scan barcodes to track calories & macros for training
apps.description: A personal calorie and macro tracker built to fuel training (BJJ, Muay Thai, S&C). Search foods or scan a barcode (USDA + Open Food Facts), log against custom daily targets with a higher-carb Sunday refeed, and snap a photo of your API key instead of typing it. Works offline; data stays on your phone.
